creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2008-07-18 16:05:19 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    devel                Makefile 
  Added files:
    devel/pear-PHP_CodeSniffer Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
  Log:
  PHP_CodeSniffer is a PHP5 script that tokenises and "sniffs" PHP and
  JavaScript code to detect violations of a defined coding standard. It
  is an essential development tool that ensures your code remains clean
  and consistent. It can also help prevent some common semantic errors
  made by developers.
  
  WWW: http://pear.php.net/package/PHP_CodeSniffer/
  
  PR:             ports/125600
  Submitted by:   Wen Heping <wenheping at gmail.com>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.3136    +1 -0      ports/devel/Makefile
  1.1       +480 -0    ports/devel/pear-PHP_CodeSniffer/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/devel/pear-PHP_CodeSniffer/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +7 -0      ports/devel/pear-PHP_CodeSniffer/pkg-descr (new)
